shorts.title: Hershey Bears fall to WBS Penguins in Game 3
shorts.title_distilled: Hershey Bears fall to WBS Penguins in Game 3.
shorts.description: HERSHEY, Pa. (WHTM) -- A late goal to force overtime in Game 3 forces the Wilkes-Barre/Scranton Penguins into a clinch position over the Hershey Bears in the Atlantic Division Semifinals. The Bears fell to the Penguins 4-3 at GIANT Center, giving the Penguins a 2-1 lead in the series. WBS can clinch the series on [...]

shorts.title: Holocaust survivors share stories at annual symposium
shorts.title_distilled: Holocaust survivors share stories at annual symposium.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — History was brought to life at the 38th Annual Teen Holocaust Symposium in Scranton on Tuesday. Close to 1,000 high-school-age students heard from many Holocaust survivors. Some of the speakers were children during the mid-1900s, while others were children and grandchildren of people who experienced the Holocaust. 34 school districts [...]

shorts.title: PennDOT says roadwork to close Scranton bridge
shorts.title_distilled: PennDOT says roadwork to close Scranton bridge.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Drivers in Scranton should prepare for a long‑term detour starting on Wednesday. Pennsylvania Department of Transportation (PennDOT) officials say the Linden Street Bridge, between 7th Avenue and Mifflin Street, will close on Wednesday for major rehabilitation work. The bridge is expected to stay closed through the end of the year. [...]
